text: Luke Skywalker is located on the desert planet Tatooine. He is closely related to Leia Organa and always defends himself with his green lightsaber.
Upon his arrival on Exegol, Kylo Ren drew his weapon. The dark warrior, who is a relative of Darth Vader, keeps his red crossguard lightsaber ready.
Boba Fett landed his ship on Kamino. He is a relative of Jango Fett and always carries his EE-3 blaster during his bounty hunts.
The brave Leia Organa stays at the base on Hoth. She is a relative of Luke Skywalker and carries a Defender sporting blaster for her protection.
Anakin Skywalker stormed into the temple on Coruscant. The young Jedi, who is a relative of Shmi Skywalker, immediately drew his blue lightsaber.
Darth Maul waited on the foggy planet of Dathomir. He is a relative of Savage Opress and fights relentlessly with his double-bladed lightsaber.
Rey roamed the desert landscape of Jakku. Although she is a relative of Palpatine, she chose the path of the Jedi and built herself a yellow lightsaber.
Jango Fett waited for his pursuers in the rain of Kamino. The mercenary, who is a relative of Boba Fett, lightning-fast drew his Westar-34 blaster pistol.
Ben Solo stood in the ruins on Kef Bir. The young man, who is a relative of Leia Organa, held his blue lightsaber tightly.
Owen Lars works on his moisture farm on Tatooine. He is a relative of Luke Skywalker and keeps an old T-21 blaster rifle in the house for emergencies.
